title: Parallelization Strategies for Dense LLM Deployment: Navigating Through Application-Specific Tradeoffs and Bottlenecks
summary: Breakthroughs in the generative AI domain have fueled an explosion of large language model (LLM)-powered applications, whose workloads fundamentally consist of sequences of inferences through transformer architectures. Within this rapidly expanding ecosystem, dense LLMs--those that activate all model parameters for each token generation--form the foundation for advanced expert-based variants. Dense models continue to dominate because of their strong generalization ability, scalability, ease of fine-tuning, and versatility across diverse tasks. In LLM inference systems, performance is mainly characterized by latency, response time, and throughput (i.e., tokens generated per unit of time). Latency and throughput are inherently coupled: optimizing for one often comes at the expense of the other. Moreover, batching strategies and parallelism configurations, which are essential when dense model parameters exceed device memory capacity, can significantly affect both latency and overall system throughput. This paper (i) investigates the workloads of two representative dense LLMs--Llama-3.1-70B and Llama-3.1-405B, focusing in particular on intra-node parallelization schemes, (ii) analyzes how input characteristics, batching, and parallelism strategies influence latency flexibility and the latency-throughput tradeoff, and (iii) identifies key performance bottlenecks that inform design choices for meeting service-level agreements (SLAs) and sustaining inference quality. Our empirical evaluations reveal that Tensor Parallelism (TP) improves the latency objectives while Pipeline Parallelism (PP) is better-suited for throughput-oriented applications. We highlight that their hybrid usage by controlling the TP and PP degrees provides control over the latency-throughput interplay.
authors: Burak Topcu, Musa Oguzhan Cim, Poovaiah Palangappa, Meena Arunachalam, Mahmut Taylan Kandemir
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文直接研究LLM推理系统中的并行化策略（Tensor Parallelism和Pipeline Parallelism），分析延迟与吞吐量权衡、批处理、内存容量限制，服务于服务级别协议（SLA）和部署效率，属于服务端推理系统优化类别。

AI.tldr: 本文研究密集大语言模型推理系统的性能优化，分析Llama-3.1-70B和405B模型在不同并行化策略下的延迟-吞吐量权衡，发现张量并行优化延迟，流水线并行优化吞吐量，混合使用可控制性能平衡。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI和大语言模型应用的爆炸式增长，密集LLM作为专家模型的基础，因其强大的泛化能力、可扩展性、易微调性和任务多样性而持续占据主导地位。在LLM推理系统中，延迟和吞吐量存在固有矛盾，而批处理策略和并行化配置对系统性能有显著影响，需要深入研究以指导满足SLA和保持推理质量的设计选择。
AI.method: 研究采用实证评估方法：(1) 分析两个代表性密集LLM（Llama-3.1-70B和Llama-3.1-405B）的工作负载，特别关注节点内并行化方案；(2) 分析输入特征、批处理和并行化策略如何影响延迟灵活性和延迟-吞吐量权衡；(3) 识别关键性能瓶颈以指导满足SLA的设计选择。
AI.result: 实证评估表明：张量并行（TP）能改善延迟目标，而流水线并行（PP）更适合吞吐量导向的应用。通过控制TP和PP的并行度，混合使用这两种并行策略可以提供对延迟-吞吐量相互作用的控制。
AI.conclusion: 密集LLM推理系统的性能优化需要在延迟和吞吐量之间进行权衡。张量并行和流水线并行各有侧重，混合使用并调整并行度可以灵活控制性能平衡，为满足不同服务级别协议和维持推理质量提供关键设计指导。

title: FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling
summary: Attention, as a core layer of the ubiquitous Transformer architecture, is the bottleneck for large language models and long-context applications. While FlashAttention-3 optimized attention for Hopper GPUs through asynchronous execution and warp specialization, it primarily targets the H100 architecture. The AI industry has rapidly transitioned to deploying Blackwell-based systems such as the B200 and GB200, which exhibit fundamentally different performance characteristics due to asymmetric hardware scaling: tensor core throughput doubles while other functional units (shared memory bandwidth, exponential units) scale more slowly or remain unchanged. We develop several techniques to address these shifting bottlenecks on Blackwell GPUs: (1) redesigned pipelines that exploit fully asynchronous MMA operations and larger tile sizes, (2) software-emulated exponential and conditional softmax rescaling that reduces non-matmul operations, and (3) leveraging tensor memory and the 2-CTA MMA mode to reduce shared memory traffic and atomic adds in the backward pass. We demonstrate that our method, FlashAttention-4, achieves up to 1.3$\times$ speedup over cuDNN 9.13 and 2.7$\times$ over Triton on B200 GPUs with BF16, reaching up to 1613 TFLOPs/s (71% utilization). Beyond algorithmic innovations, we implement FlashAttention-4 entirely in CuTe-DSL embedded in Python, achieving 20-30$\times$ faster compile times compared to traditional C++ template-based approaches while maintaining full expressivity.
authors: Ted Zadouri, Markus Hoehnerbach, Jay Shah, Timmy Liu, Vijay Thakkar, Tri Dao
infra_reason: 核心强相关：FlashAttention系列是LLM推理优化的关键组件，本文针对Blackwell GPU硬件特性优化attention计算，直接提升推理效率，属于模型侧推理优化（B类）。

AI.tldr: FlashAttention-4针对Blackwell GPU架构优化注意力计算，通过异步MMA操作、软件模拟指数函数、利用张量内存等技术，相比cuDNN和Triton分别实现1.3倍和2.7倍加速，达到1613 TFLOPs/s（71%利用率），并使用CuTe-DSL实现20-30倍编译加速。
AI.motivation: 注意力作为Transformer核心层是大型语言模型和长上下文应用的瓶颈。FlashAttention-3主要针对H100架构优化，而AI行业已快速转向Blackwell架构（B200/GB200），其硬件特性发生根本变化：张量核心吞吐量翻倍，但共享内存带宽、指数单元等功能单元扩展较慢或保持不变，需要新的优化方法应对这些变化瓶颈。
AI.method: 针对Blackwell GPU的优化技术包括：1）重新设计流水线，利用完全异步MMA操作和更大瓦片尺寸；2）软件模拟指数和条件softmax重缩放，减少非矩阵乘法操作；3）利用张量内存和2-CTA MMA模式减少共享内存流量和反向传播中的原子加法。此外，完全使用嵌入Python的CuTe-DSL实现，相比传统C++模板方法实现20-30倍编译加速。
AI.result: 在B200 GPU上使用BF16精度，FlashAttention-4相比cuDNN 9.13实现最高1.3倍加速，相比Triton实现最高2.7倍加速，达到1613 TFLOPs/s（71%利用率）。编译时间相比传统C++模板方法快20-30倍。
AI.conclusion: FlashAttention-4成功针对Blackwell GPU架构的不对称硬件扩展特性进行了优化，通过算法创新和开发工具改进，显著提升了注意力计算的性能，为下一代GPU架构上的高效注意力计算提供了解决方案。

title: SlideSparse: Fast and Flexible (2N-2):2N Structured Sparsity
summary: NVIDIA's 2:4 Sparse Tensor Cores deliver 2x throughput but demand strict 50% pruning -- a ratio that collapses LLM reasoning accuracy (Qwen3: 54% to 15%). Milder $(2N-2):2N$ patterns (e.g., 6:8, 25% pruning) preserve accuracy yet receive no hardware support, falling back to dense execution without any benefit from sparsity. We present SlideSparse, the first system to unlock Sparse Tensor Core acceleration for the $(2N-2):2N$ model family on commodity GPUs. Our Sliding Window Decomposition reconstructs any $(2N-2):2N$ weight block into $N-1$ overlapping 2:4-compliant windows without any accuracy loss; Activation Lifting fuses the corresponding activation rearrangement into per-token quantization at near-zero cost. Integrated into vLLM, SlideSparse is evaluated across various GPUs (A100, H100, B200, RTX 4090, RTX 5080, DGX-spark), precisions (FP4, INT8, FP8, BF16, FP16), and model families (Llama, Qwen, BitNet). On compute-bound workloads, the measured speedup ratio (1.33x) approaches the theoretical upper-bound $N/(N-1)=4/3$ at 6:8 weight sparsity in Qwen2.5-7B, establishing $(2N-2):2N$ as a practical path to accuracy-preserving LLM acceleration. Code available at https://github.com/bcacdwk/vllmbench.
authors: Hanyong Shao, Yingbo Hao, Ting Song, Yan Xia, Di Zhang, Shaohan Huang, Xun Wu, Songchen Xu, Le Xu, Li Dong, Zewen Chi, Yi Zou, Furu Wei
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文提出SlideSparse系统，通过结构化稀疏和硬件优化（Sparse Tensor Core）直接加速LLM推理，集成到vLLM中，专注于提升推理效率（速度、内存、部署），属于模型侧推理优化（B类）。

AI.tldr: SlideSparse系统首次在商用GPU上为(2N-2):2N稀疏模式（如6:8）提供稀疏张量核心加速，通过滑动窗口分解和激活提升技术，在保持精度的同时实现接近理论上限的1.33倍加速。
AI.motivation: NVIDIA的2:4稀疏张量核心虽然提供2倍吞吐量，但需要严格的50%剪枝，这会严重损害LLM推理精度。而更温和的(2N-2):2N模式（如6:8，25%剪枝）能保持精度，但缺乏硬件支持，只能回退到密集执行，无法利用稀疏性优势。
AI.method: SlideSparse采用两种核心技术：1) 滑动窗口分解：将任意(2N-2):2N权重块重构为N-1个重叠的2:4兼容窗口，无精度损失；2) 激活提升：将相应的激活重排融合到每令牌量化中，成本几乎为零。系统集成到vLLM框架中。
AI.result: 在计算受限工作负载中，实测加速比达到1.33倍，接近理论上限N/(N-1)=4/3（对于6:8稀疏度）。在Qwen2.5-7B等模型上验证了(2N-2):2N作为保持精度的LLM加速实用路径。支持多种GPU、精度和模型家族。
AI.conclusion: SlideSparse首次为(2N-2):2N稀疏模式家族提供了稀疏张量核心加速，填补了硬件支持空白，在保持LLM推理精度的同时实现了显著的性能提升，为准确度保持的稀疏化LLM加速提供了实用解决方案。

title: Balancing Coverage and Draft Latency in Vocabulary Trimming for Faster Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates inference for Large Language Models by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are verified in parallel by a larger target model. Prior work shows that the draft model often dominates speculative decoding latency, since it generates tokens sequentially and incurs high cost from its language modeling head as vocabulary size grows. This exposes a fundamental trade-off in draft model design: larger vocabularies improve token coverage and agreement with the target model, but incur higher draft latency, while smaller vocabularies reduce latency at the risk of missing tokens required for accurate draft generation. We address this trade-off through vocabulary trimming for draft models, motivated by the observation that domain-specific workloads use only a small fraction of the full vocabulary. We cast draft vocabulary selection as a constrained optimization problem that balances token coverage and draft latency. Coverage is computed over assistant responses in the training data, while latency is estimated using architecture-aware FLOPs that capture the cost of the language modeling head as a function of vocabulary size. We optimize a utility function with a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator to efficiently explore the coverage-latency Pareto frontier under a minimum coverage constraint. Experiments show improved speculative decoding throughput while reducing draft vocabularies by up to 97% with high coverage. On domain-specific tasks, we achieve up to 16% latency reduction and 20% throughput improvement, and up to 6.7% throughput gains on diverse out-of-distribution tasks.
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文专注于speculative decoding优化，通过词汇裁剪减少draft模型延迟，直接提升LLM推理效率和吞吐量，属于模型侧推理优化类别。

AI.tldr: 通过词汇表剪枝优化推测解码：针对领域特定任务，大幅削减草稿模型词汇表规模（最高97%），在保持高覆盖率的同时显著提升推理吞吐量
AI.motivation: 推测解码中草稿模型的词汇表设计存在根本性权衡：大词汇表提高token覆盖率和与目标模型的一致性，但增加延迟；小词汇表降低延迟但可能遗漏关键token。领域特定任务仅使用完整词汇表的一小部分，这为词汇表优化提供了机会。
AI.method: 将草稿模型词汇表选择建模为约束优化问题，平衡token覆盖率和草稿延迟。覆盖率基于训练数据中的助手响应计算，延迟使用架构感知的FLOPs估计（考虑语言建模头成本与词汇表大小的关系）。采用树结构Parzen估计器优化效用函数，在最小覆盖率约束下探索覆盖率-延迟Pareto前沿。
AI.result: 实验显示推测解码吞吐量显著提升，草稿模型词汇表最多减少97%同时保持高覆盖率。在领域特定任务上，延迟降低最高16%，吞吐量提升最高20%；在多样化分布外任务上，吞吐量提升最高6.7%。
AI.conclusion: 词汇表剪枝是优化推测解码的有效方法，通过针对特定领域定制草稿模型词汇表，在保持高覆盖率的同时显著降低延迟并提升吞吐量，解决了草稿模型设计中的根本性权衡问题。

title: Sparse-BitNet: 1.58-bit LLMs are Naturally Friendly to Semi-Structured Sparsity
summary: Semi-structured N:M sparsity and low-bit quantization (e.g., 1.58-bit BitNet) are two promising approaches for improving the efficiency of large language models (LLMs), yet they have largely been studied in isolation. In this work, we investigate their interaction and show that 1.58-bit BitNet is naturally more compatible with N:M sparsity than full-precision models. To study this effect, we propose Sparse-BitNet, a unified framework that jointly applies 1.58-bit quantization and dynamic N:M sparsification while ensuring stable training for the first time. Across multiple model scales and training regimes (sparse pretraining and dense-to-sparse schedules), 1.58-bit BitNet consistently exhibits smaller performance degradation than full-precision baselines at the same sparsity levels and can tolerate higher structured sparsity before accuracy collapse. Moreover, using our custom sparse tensor core, Sparse-BitNet achieves substantial speedups in both training and inference, reaching up to 1.30X. These results highlight that combining extremely low-bit quantization with semi-structured N:M sparsity is a promising direction for efficient LLMs. Code available at https://github.com/AAzdi/Sparse-BitNet
authors: Di Zhang, Xun Wu, Shaohan Huang, Yudong Wang, Hanyong Shao, Yingbo Hao, Zewen Chi, Li Dong, Ting Song, Yan Xia, Zhifang Sui, Furu Wei
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文结合1.58位量化和N:M稀疏化，直接优化LLM推理效率，包括训练和推理加速，属于模型侧推理优化（B类），并涉及硬件定制实现。

AI.tldr: Sparse-BitNet：首次将1.58位BitNet量化与动态N:M稀疏化统一框架，证明极低位量化与半结构化稀疏协同增效，在相同稀疏度下性能损失更小，训练推理加速达1.30倍。
AI.motivation: 半结构化N:M稀疏和低位量化（如1.58位BitNet）是提升大语言模型效率的两个有前景方向，但此前研究多孤立进行。本文旨在探究两者的交互作用，验证BitNet是否比全精度模型更兼容N:M稀疏。
AI.method: 提出Sparse-BitNet统一框架，首次联合应用1.58位量化和动态N:M稀疏化，确保训练稳定性。采用自定义稀疏张量核心实现加速，在多种模型规模和训练机制（稀疏预训练和稠密到稀疏调度）下进行验证。
AI.result: 1.58位BitNet在相同稀疏度下比全精度基线性能下降更小，能容忍更高的结构化稀疏度才出现精度崩溃。使用自定义稀疏张量核心，训练和推理均实现显著加速，最高达1.30倍。
AI.conclusion: 极低位量化与半结构化N:M稀疏结合是大语言模型效率优化的有前景方向。Sparse-BitNet框架首次实现两者的稳定联合训练，证明量化模型对结构化稀疏具有更强的鲁棒性。

title: PromptTuner: SLO-Aware Elastic System for LLM Prompt Tuning
summary: Prompt tuning has become a prominent strategy for enhancing the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) on downstream tasks. Many IT enterprises now offer Prompt-Tuning-as-a-Service to fulfill the growing demand for prompt tuning LLMs on downstream tasks. Their primary objective is to satisfy users Service Level Objectives (SLOs) while reducing resource provisioning costs. Nevertheless, our characterization analysis for existing deep learning resource management systems reveals that they are insufficient to optimize these objectives for LLM prompt tuning workloads. In this paper, we introduce PromptTuner, an SLO-aware elastic system to optimize LLM prompt tuning. It contains two innovations. (1) We design a Prompt Bank to identify efficient initial prompts to expedite the convergence of prompt tuning. (2) We develop aWorkload Scheduler to enable fast resource allocation to reduce the SLO violation and resource costs. In our evaluation, PromptTuner reduces SLO violations by 4.0x and 7.9x, and lowers costs by 1.6x and 4.5x, compared to INFless and ElasticFlow respectively.
authors: Wei Gao, Peng Sun, Dmitrii Ustiugov, Tianwei Zhang, Yonggang Wen
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文聚焦服务端推理系统，涉及SLO-aware调度、资源分配、成本优化，直接针对LLM prompt tuning的推理部署效率，属于A类服务端推理系统优化。

AI.tldr: PromptTuner：面向LLM提示调优的SLO感知弹性系统，通过Prompt Bank和Workload Scheduler减少SLO违规和资源成本
AI.motivation: 随着Prompt-Tuning-as-a-Service的兴起，企业需要在满足用户SLO的同时降低资源成本。现有深度学习资源管理系统对LLM提示调优工作负载的优化不足，需要专门解决方案。
AI.method: 提出PromptTuner系统，包含两个创新：(1) Prompt Bank：识别高效初始提示以加速提示调优收敛；(2) Workload Scheduler：实现快速资源分配以减少SLO违规和资源成本。
AI.result: 与INFless和ElasticFlow相比，PromptTuner将SLO违规分别减少4.0倍和7.9倍，将成本分别降低1.6倍和4.5倍。
AI.conclusion: PromptTuner是专门为LLM提示调优设计的SLO感知弹性系统，能有效平衡服务质量与资源成本，为Prompt-Tuning-as-a-Service提供优化解决方案。

title: Good-Enough LLM Obfuscation (GELO)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly served on shared accelerators where an adversary with read access to device memory can observe KV caches and hidden states, threatening prompt privacy for open-source models. Cryptographic protections such as MPC and FHE offer strong guarantees but remain one to two orders of magnitude too slow for interactive inference, while static obfuscation schemes break under multi-run statistical attacks once the model is known. We present GELO (Good-Enough LLM Obfuscation), a lightweight protocol for privacy-preserving inference that limits information leakage from untrusted accelerator observations by hiding hidden states with fresh, per-batch invertible mixing. For each offloaded projection, the TEE samples a random matrix $A$, forms $U = AH$, offloads $U$ and weights W to the accelerator, and then applies $A^{-1}$ on return, so that $A^{-1}((AH)W ) = HW$ and outputs are unchanged. Because mixing is never reused across batches, the attacker faces only a single-batch blind source separation problem. We analyse information leakage and introduce two practical defences: (i) non-orthogonal mixing to mask Gram matrices, and (ii) orthogonal mixing augmented with a small fraction of high-energy "shield" vectors that pollute higher-order statistics. On Llama-2 7B, GELO preserves float32 outputs exactly, closely matches low-precision baselines, offloads the dominant matrix multiplications with about 20-30% latency overhead, and defeats a range of ICA/BSS and anchor-based attacks.
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文聚焦于LLM推理中的隐私保护，通过轻量级混淆协议（如每批次可逆混合）隐藏KV缓存和隐藏状态，直接针对服务端推理系统在共享加速器上的安全威胁，优化推理部署效率（如20-30%延迟开销），属于服务端推理系统优化范畴。

AI.tldr: GELO是一种轻量级隐私保护推理协议，通过每批次可逆混合隐藏隐藏状态，防止共享加速器上的KV缓存和隐藏状态泄露，在保持输出精度的同时仅增加20-30%延迟开销。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在共享加速器上部署时，攻击者可通过读取设备内存观察KV缓存和隐藏状态，威胁开源模型的提示隐私。现有加密方案（如MPC和FHE）速度过慢，静态混淆方案在多轮统计攻击下易被破解。
AI.method: GELO使用每批次新鲜可逆混合矩阵A隐藏隐藏状态H：TEE采样随机矩阵A，计算U=AH，将U和权重W卸载到加速器，返回后应用A⁻¹恢复HW。采用两种防御：(1)非正交混合掩蔽Gram矩阵；(2)正交混合加少量高能量"屏蔽"向量污染高阶统计量。
AI.result: 在Llama-2 7B上，GELO精确保持float32输出，接近低精度基线，卸载主要矩阵乘法仅增加20-30%延迟开销，成功抵御ICA/BSS和基于锚点的攻击。
AI.conclusion: GELO提供了一种实用的隐私保护推理方案，通过轻量级可逆混合在保持模型性能的同时有效限制信息泄露，解决了共享加速器环境下的提示隐私问题。

title: VMXDOTP: A RISC-V Vector ISA Extension for Efficient Microscaling (MX) Format Acceleration
summary: Compared to the first generation of deep neural networks, dominated by regular, compute-intensive kernels such as matrix multiplications (MatMuls) and convolutions, modern decoder-based transformers interleave attention, normalization, and data-dependent control flow. This demands flexible accelerators, a requirement met by scalable, highly energy-efficient shared-L1-memory vector processing element (VPE) clusters. Meanwhile, the ever-growing size and bandwidth needs of state-of-the-art models make reduced-precision formats increasingly attractive. Microscaling (MX) data formats, based on block floating-point (BFP) representations, have emerged as a promising solution to reduce data volumes while preserving accuracy. However, MX semantics are poorly aligned with vector execution: block scaling and multi-step mixed-precision operations break the regularity of vector pipelines, leading to underutilized compute resources and performance degradation. To address these challenges, we propose VMXDOTP, a RISC-V Vector (RVV) 1.0 instruction set architecture (ISA) extension for efficient MX dot product execution, supporting MXFP8 and MXFP4 inputs, FP32 and BF16 accumulation, and software-defined block sizes. A VMXDOTP-enhanced VPE cluster achieves up to 97 % utilization on MX-MatMul. Implemented in 12 nm FinFET, it achieves up to 125 MXFP8-GFLOPS and 250 MXFP4-GFLOPS, with 843/1632 MXFP8/MXFP4-GFLOPS/W at 1 GHz, 0.8 V, and only 7.2 % area overhead. Our design yields up to 7.0x speedup and 4.9x energy efficiency with respect to software-emulated MXFP8-MatMul. Compared with prior MX engines, VMXDOTP supports variable block sizes, is up to 1.4x more area-efficient, and delivers up to 2.1x higher energy efficiency.
authors: Max Wipfli, Gamze İslamoğlu, Navaneeth Kunhi Purayil, Angelo Garofalo, Luca Benini
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文提出RISC-V向量ISA扩展VMXDOTP，专门针对MX格式（如MXFP8/MXFP4）的点积加速，直接服务于LLM推理中的低精度计算优化，属于硬件侧推理优化（C类），能显著提升能效和性能，与推理效率紧密相关。

AI.tldr: 提出VMXDOTP指令集扩展，用于在RISC-V向量处理器上高效执行微缩放格式的点积运算，解决MX格式与向量执行不匹配的问题，显著提升能效和性能。
AI.motivation: 现代解码器Transformer模型需要灵活的加速器，微缩放数据格式虽能减少数据量但语义与向量执行不匹配，导致计算资源利用率低和性能下降。
AI.method: 提出VMXDOTP指令集扩展，支持MXFP8和MXFP4输入、FP32和BF16累加、软件定义块大小，在12nm FinFET工艺中实现增强的向量处理单元集群。
AI.result: 在MX-MatMul上达到97%利用率，实现125 MXFP8-GFLOPS和250 MXFP4-GFLOPS，能效达843/1632 MXFP8/MXFP4-GFLOPS/W，面积开销仅7.2%，相比软件模拟MXFP8-MatMul提升7.0倍速度和4.9倍能效。
AI.conclusion: VMXDOTP有效解决了微缩放格式与向量执行的语义不匹配问题，支持可变块大小，在面积效率和能效方面优于现有MX引擎，为现代Transformer模型提供了高效的硬件支持。

title: WaterSIC: information-theoretically (near) optimal linear layer quantization
summary: This paper considers the problem of converting a given dense linear layer to low precision. The tradeoff between compressed length and output discrepancy is analyzed information theoretically (IT). It is shown that a popular GPTQ algorithm may have an arbitrarily large gap to the IT limit. To alleviate this problem, a novel algorithm, termed ''WaterSIC'', is proposed and is shown to be within a rate gap of 0.255 bits to the IT limit, uniformly over all possible covariance matrices of input activations. The key innovation of WaterSIC's is to allocate different quantization rates to different columns (in-features) of the weight matrix, mimicking the classical IT solution known as ''waterfilling''. Applying WaterSIC to the Llama and Qwen family of LLMs establishes new state-of-the-art performance for all quantization rates from 1 to 4 bits.
authors: Egor Lifar, Semyon Savkin, Or Ordentlich, Yury Polyanskiy
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文专注于LLM线性层的量化优化，直接提升推理效率（减少内存和计算成本），属于模型侧推理优化（B类），并应用于Llama和Qwen等LLM，建立SOTA性能。

AI.tldr: 提出WaterSIC算法，通过信息论分析线性层低精度量化问题，采用类似"注水"策略为权重矩阵不同列分配不同量化率，在Llama和Qwen系列LLMs上实现1-4比特量化SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有GPTQ算法在将稠密线性层转换为低精度时，与信息论极限可能存在任意大的差距，需要更接近理论极限的量化算法
AI.method: 提出WaterSIC算法，基于信息论分析量化压缩长度与输出误差的权衡，采用类似"注水"策略为权重矩阵的不同列分配不同量化率，实现对输入激活协方差矩阵的均匀逼近
AI.result: WaterSIC算法在信息论极限的0.255比特速率差距内，在Llama和Qwen系列LLMs上实现了1-4比特量化的最新SOTA性能
AI.conclusion: WaterSIC算法通过信息论指导的列级量化率分配，显著提升了线性层低精度量化的性能，为LLM量化提供了接近理论极限的有效解决方案

title: LocalSUG: Geography-Aware LLM for Query Suggestion in Local-Life Services
summary: In local-life service platforms, the query suggestion module plays a crucial role in enhancing user experience by generating candidate queries based on user input prefixes, thus reducing user effort and accelerating search. Traditional multi-stage cascading systems rely heavily on historical top queries, limiting their ability to address long-tail demand. While LLMs offer strong semantic generalization, deploying them in local-life services introduces three key challenges: lack of geographic grounding, exposure bias in preference optimization, and online inference latency. To address these issues, we propose LocalSUG, an LLM-based query suggestion framework tailored for local-life service platforms. First, we introduce a city-aware candidate mining strategy based on term co-occurrence to inject geographic grounding into generation. Second, we propose a beam-search-driven GRPO algorithm that aligns training with inference-time decoding, reducing exposure bias in autoregressive generation. A multi-objective reward mechanism further optimizes both relevance and business-oriented metrics. Finally, we develop quality-aware beam acceleration and vocabulary pruning techniques that significantly reduce online latency while preserving generation quality. Extensive offline evaluations and large-scale online A/B testing demonstrate that LocalSUG improves click-through rate (CTR) by +0.35% and reduces the low/no-result rate by 2.56%, validating its effectiveness in real-world deployment.
authors: Jinwen Chen, Shuai Gong, Shiwen Zhang, Zheng Zhang, Yachao Zhao, Lingxiang Wang, Haibo Zhou, Yuan Zhan, Wei Lin, Hainan Zhang
infra_reason: 论文核心贡献包括质量感知波束加速和词汇剪枝技术，直接优化在线推理延迟，属于服务端推理系统优化（A类），尽管应用场景为本地生活服务，但技术方法通用且强相关。

AI.tldr: LocalSUG：针对本地生活服务平台提出的LLM查询建议框架，通过城市感知候选挖掘、GRPO算法和多目标奖励机制解决地理定位、曝光偏差和延迟问题，显著提升CTR并降低无结果率。
AI.motivation: 本地生活服务平台的传统多阶段级联查询建议系统过度依赖历史热门查询，难以满足长尾需求。虽然LLM具有强大的语义泛化能力，但在本地生活服务中面临三个关键挑战：缺乏地理定位、偏好优化中的曝光偏差以及在线推理延迟。
AI.method: 1. 基于词项共现的城市感知候选挖掘策略，为生成注入地理定位信息；2. 基于束搜索的GRPO算法，对齐训练与推理时解码，减少自回归生成中的曝光偏差；3. 多目标奖励机制，同时优化相关性和业务指标；4. 质量感知的束加速和词汇表剪枝技术，降低在线延迟。
AI.result: 大规模在线A/B测试显示，LocalSUG将点击率（CTR）提升+0.35%，并将低/无结果率降低2.56%，验证了其在真实部署中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LocalSUG成功解决了LLM在本地生活服务查询建议中的三大挑战，通过地理定位注入、曝光偏差减少和延迟优化，实现了性能提升，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Hardware-Software Co-design for 3D-DRAM-based LLM Serving Accelerator
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely deployed for online generative services, where numerous LLM instances jointly handle workloads with fluctuating request arrival rates and variable request lengths. To efficiently execute coexisting compute-intensive and memory-intensive operators, near-memory processing (NMP) based computing paradigm has been extensively proposed. However, existing NMP designs adopt coarse-grained KV cache management and inflexible attention execution flow. Such limitations hinder these proposals from efficiently handling \textit{highly dynamic} LLM serving workloads, limiting their ability to accelerate LLM serving. To tackle these problems, we propose Helios, a Hybrid-bonding-based \uline{L}LM \uline{S}erving accelerator. Helios aims to bridge the fundamental gap between the dynamic nature of KV cache management in LLM serving and the distributed, non-uniform memory abstraction among NMP processing engines (PEs). To this end, we design both the intra-PE execution flow and the inter-PE communication primitives for distributed tiled attention execution. We further propose \textit{spatially-aware} KV cache allocation mechanism to balance the attention workload distribution while minimizing the inter-PE data transfer overhead. Compared with existing GPU/NMP designs, Helios achieves 3.25 times (geomean) speedup and 3.36 times (geomean) better energy efficiency, along with up to 72%/76% P50/P99 time-between-tokens degradation.
authors: Cong Li, Yihan Yin, Chenhao Xue, Zhao Wang, Fujun Bai, Yixin Guo, Xiping Jiang, Qiang Wu, Yuan Xie, Guangyu Sun
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文提出硬件-软件协同设计的LLM服务加速器，专注于KV cache管理、分布式注意力执行和调度优化，直接针对服务端推理系统的内存和计算瓶颈，属于硬件侧推理优化类别。

AI.tldr: Helios是一种基于混合键合的LLM服务加速器，通过细粒度KV缓存管理和分布式分块注意力执行，优化动态LLM服务负载
AI.motivation: 现有近内存处理(NMP)设计采用粗粒度KV缓存管理和不灵活的注意力执行流程，无法高效处理高度动态的LLM服务负载，限制了LLM服务的加速能力
AI.method: 设计混合键合LLM服务加速器Helios，包括：1) 设计PE内执行流程和PE间通信原语用于分布式分块注意力执行；2) 提出空间感知KV缓存分配机制以平衡注意力工作负载分布并最小化PE间数据传输开销
AI.result: 与现有GPU/NMP设计相比，Helios实现了3.25倍（几何平均）加速和3.36倍（几何平均）能效提升，P50/P99 token间时间分别降低72%/76%
AI.conclusion: Helios通过细粒度KV缓存管理和分布式注意力执行，有效解决了动态LLM服务负载中的内存管理问题，显著提升了服务性能和能效

title: Stacked from One: Multi-Scale Self-Injection for Context Window Extension
summary: The limited context window of contemporary large language models (LLMs) remains a primary bottleneck for their broader application across diverse domains. Although continual pre-training on long-context data offers a straightforward solution, it incurs prohibitive data acquisition and computational costs. To address this challenge, we propose~\modelname, a novel framework based on multi-grained context compression and query-aware information acquisition. SharedLLM comprises two stacked short-context LLMs: a lower model serving as a compressor and an upper model acting as a decoder. The lower model compresses long inputs into compact, multi-grained representations, which are then forwarded to the upper model for context-aware processing. To maximize efficiency, this information transfer occurs exclusively at the lowest layers, bypassing lengthy forward passes and redundant cross-attention operations. This entire process, wherein the upper and lower models are derived from the same underlying LLM layers, is termed~\textit{self-injection}. To support this architecture, a specialized tree-based data structure enables the efficient encoding and query-aware retrieval of contextual information. Despite being trained on sequences of only 8K tokens, \modelname~effectively generalizes to inputs exceeding 128K tokens. Across a comprehensive suite of long-context modeling and understanding benchmarks, \modelname~achieves performance superior or comparable to strong baselines, striking an optimal balance between efficiency and accuracy. Furthermore, these design choices allow \modelname~to substantially reduce the memory footprint and yield notable inference speedups ($2\times$ over streaming and $3\times$ over encoder-decoder architectures).
authors: Wei Han, Pan Zhou, Shuicheng Yan
infra_reason: 核心强相关：论文提出多尺度自注入框架，通过压缩长上下文和查询感知信息获取，显著减少内存占用和推理加速（2-3倍），直接优化LLM推理效率和部署效率，属于模型侧推理优化。

AI.tldr: SharedLLM：基于多粒度上下文压缩和查询感知信息获取的新型长上下文处理框架，通过自注入架构在仅8K训练序列上实现128K+上下文处理，显著提升效率
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的有限上下文窗口是其主要瓶颈，而持续预训练长上下文数据成本过高，需要更高效的解决方案
AI.method: 采用堆叠式短上下文LLM架构：下层模型作为压缩器将长输入压缩为多粒度表示，上层模型作为解码器进行上下文感知处理；通过自注入机制在最低层进行信息传输，避免冗余计算；使用树状数据结构支持高效编码和查询感知检索
AI.result: 在仅8K token序列训练下，能有效泛化到超过128K token的输入；在长上下文建模和理解基准测试中性能优于或媲美强基线；内存占用显著降低，推理速度提升2倍（相比流式）和3倍（相比编码器-解码器架构）
AI.conclusion: SharedLLM通过创新的多粒度压缩和自注入架构，在效率和准确性之间取得了最佳平衡，为长上下文处理提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案
